description: Queries public org-aware API views such as api_network_demand_by_org; internal v_base_*_by_org views are not dashboard surfaces.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT toStartOfInterval(hour, INTERVAL 1 HOUR) AS time,
    toFloat64(sum(total_wei)) / 1e18 AS total_revenue_eth
FROM naap.api_payment_hourly
WHERE $__timeFilter(hour)
AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

WITH identity AS (
    SELECT addr, ens_name
    FROM (
        SELECT orch_address AS addr,
            name AS ens_name,
            row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY orch_address ORDER BY last_seen DESC, org DESC) AS rn
        FROM naap.api_latest_orchestrator_state
    )
    WHERE rn = 1
),
label_meta AS (
    SELECT addr,
        ens_name,
        count() OVER (PARTITION BY lower(ens_name)) AS name_collision_count
    FROM identity
),
labels AS (
    SELECT addr,
        if(ifNull(ens_name, '') != '' AND NOT startsWith(lower(ens_name), '0x'), if(name_collision_count > 1, concat(ens_name, ' (', left(addr, 8), '...', right(addr, 4), ')'), ens_name), concat(left(addr, 8), '...', right(addr, 4))) AS orch_label
    FROM label_meta
),
latest_quotes AS (
    SELECT orch_address, last_seen, model_id, price_per_unit, pixels_per_unit
    FROM (
        SELECT orch_address, org, last_seen,
            JSONExtractString(cap_item, 'constraint') AS model_id,
            JSONExtractInt(cap_item, 'pricePerUnit') AS price_per_unit,
            JSONExtractInt(cap_item, 'pixelsPerUnit') AS pixels_per_unit,
            row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY orch_address, JSONExtractString(cap_item, 'constraint') ORDER BY last_seen DESC, org DESC) AS rn
        FROM naap.api_latest_orchestrator_state
        ARRAY JOIN JSONExtractArrayRaw(raw_capabilities, 'capabilities_prices') AS cap_item
        WHERE JSONExtractInt(cap_item, 'pricePerUnit') > 0
        AND JSONExtractInt(cap_item, 'pixelsPerUnit') > 0
        AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
        AND ('${orchestrator:csv}' = '__all' OR '${orchestrator:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${orchestrator:csv}'), orch_address))
    )
    WHERE rn = 1
)
SELECT q.last_seen AS "Quote Time",
    ifNull(labels.orch_label, concat(left(q.orch_address, 8), '...', right(q.orch_address, 4))) AS "Orchestrator",
    q.orch_address AS "Orchestrator Address",
    q.model_id AS "Model",
    round(toFloat64(q.price_per_unit) * 1000000.0 / toFloat64(q.pixels_per_unit) / 1000000000.0, 4) AS "Price (gwei/MP)"
FROM latest_quotes q
LEFT JOIN labels ON labels.addr = q.orch_address
ORDER BY "Quote Time" DESC, "Price (gwei/MP)" DESC
LIMIT 20

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT org FROM naap.api_latest_orchestrator_state WHERE org != '' ORDER BY org
list.label: Org
list.name: org
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT org FROM naap.api_latest_orchestrator_state WHERE org != '' ORDER BY org

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT model_id FROM naap.api_gpu_inventory WHERE model_id != '' ORDER BY model_id
list.label: Model
list.name: model
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT model_id FROM naap.api_gpu_inventory WHERE model_id != '' ORDER BY model_id

list.definition: SELECT orch_address AS __value, if(name != '' AND NOT startsWith(lower(name), '0x'), concat(name, ' (', orch_address, ')'), orch_address) AS __text FROM naap.api_latest_orchestrator_state ORDER BY if(name != '' AND NOT startsWith(lower(name), '0x'), 1, 0) DESC, __text
list.label: Orchestrator (ENS)
list.name: orchestrator
list.query: SELECT orch_address AS __value, if(name != '' AND NOT startsWith(lower(name), '0x'), concat(name, ' (', orch_address, ')'), orch_address) AS __text FROM naap.api_latest_orchestrator_state ORDER BY if(name != '' AND NOT startsWith(lower(name), '0x'), 1, 0) DESC, __text
